body:
This PR makes a few small improvements:

1. We don't want to put `download_dataset` into the example scripts, because this may mislead users into thinking this is _necessary_, when its not. I think predownloading slows down the time a user can get to first simulation, so generally if it is not needed, we should not do it, as a matter of practice. We should implement a metadata tutorial which explains manual downloading for the users that do need it (which hopefully will decrease over time --- not having internet on nodes is I think a big limitation in the modern era).

2. Don't capitalize "ocean" in example names

labels.description: Add this label to built the docs in a PR
labels.name: build docs

title: Improve examples a bit

body: the `Field` constructor needs the donwloaded data for particular datasets (like Copernicus) to be able to build the `native_grid`. So the `download_dataset` should be performed before `native_grid`
title: Fix a bug in `Field(metadata)`
